question: Which airlines have a flight with destination airport AHD?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.DestAirport  =  "AHD"
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.airl FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.airl WHERE T2.dest = 'AHD'
raw_response: SELECT T1.airl FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.airl WHERE T2.dest = 'AHD'
